Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="accordion-header"> <button aria-controls="collapseNav-10008" aria-expanded="false" class="accordion-button collapsed" data-bs-target="#collapseNav-10008" data-bs-toggle="collapse" type="but
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Åpent i dag</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

<h6 class="text-black fs-5 text-center font-primary"> 08:00 </h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navbar"> <div class="navbar-container container-lg"> <a class="navbar-brand" href="/"> <svg fill="#2F4A31" height="56" viewbox="0 0 102 56" width="102" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

<a class="btn btn-primary mt-3 stretched-link" href="https://www.floirestauranten.no">Gå til floirestauranten.no</a>

Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

Gavekort - Fløyen

https://www.floyen.no/kjop-gavekort
Avvik: 79 | Bestått: 173
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="https://st-floyen2.nf.cdn.netflexapp.com/1753257071/vektorfil-1.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="d-flex flex-column h-100"> <!-- Google Tag Manager --> <noscript><iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-N7J57X" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="accordion-header"> <button aria-controls="collapseNav-10008" aria-expanded="false" class="accordion-button collapsed" data-bs-target="#collapseNav-10008" data-bs-toggle="collapse" type="but
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Åpent i dag</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

<h6 class="text-black fs-5 text-center font-primary"> 08:00 </h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Kommende opplevelser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Åpent i dag</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="m-0">Følg oss</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Avvik: 80 | Bestått: 170

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

Add descriptive alt text to the image

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="accordion-header"> <button aria-controls="collapseNav-10008" aria-expanded="false" class="accordion-button collapsed" data-bs-target="#collapseNav-10008" data-bs-toggle="collapse" type="but
Start your heading structure with h1

Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

Start your heading structure with h1

Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

First heading is h2, should start with h1

Start your heading structure with h1

Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4

Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Start your heading structure with h1

Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="accordion-header"> <button aria-controls="collapseNav-10008" aria-expanded="false" class="accordion-button collapsed" data-bs-target="#collapseNav-10008" data-bs-toggle="collapse" type="but
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Åpent i dag</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

<h6 class="text-black fs-5 text-center font-primary"> 08:00 </h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Kommende opplevelser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

MODERATE

https://www.floyen.no/aktiviteter/turmuligheter
Avvik: 82 | Bestått: 175
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="https://st-floyen2.nf.cdn.netflexapp.com/1753257071/vektorfil-1.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="accordion-header"> <button aria-controls="collapseNav-10008" aria-expanded="false" class="accordion-button collapsed" data-bs-target="#collapseNav-10008" data-bs-toggle="collapse" type="but
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Åpent i dag</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

<h6 class="text-black fs-5 text-center font-primary"> 08:00 </h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Kommende opplevelser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Åpent i dag</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Årsrapport - Fløyen

https://www.floyen.no/arsrapport
Avvik: 80 | Bestått: 167
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="https://st-floyen2.nf.cdn.netflexapp.com/1753257071/vektorfil-1.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="accordion-header"> <button aria-controls="collapseNav-10008" aria-expanded="false" class="accordion-button collapsed" data-bs-target="#collapseNav-10008" data-bs-toggle="collapse" type="but
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Åpent i dag</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

<h6 class="text-black fs-5 text-center font-primary"> 08:00 </h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Kommende opplevelser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Åpent i dag</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 style="text-align: center;"><a href="https://st-floyen2.nf.cdn.netflexapp.com/1744355206/aarsrapport-2024.pdf">Last ned som PDF</a></h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="m-0">Følg oss</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navbar"> <div class="navbar-container container-lg"> <a class="navbar-brand" href="/"> <svg fill="#2F4A31" height="56" viewbox="0 0 102 56" width="102" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (9 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="accordion-header"> <button aria-controls="collapseNav-10008" aria-expanded="false" class="accordion-button collapsed" data-bs-target="#collapseNav-10008" data-bs-toggle="collapse" type="but
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Åpent i dag</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

<h6 class="text-black fs-5 text-center font-primary"> 08:00 </h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Kommende opplevelser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Åpent i dag</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

MODERATE

https://www.floyen.no/floibanen/apningstider
Avvik: 79 | Bestått: 178

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="accordion-header"> <button aria-controls="collapseNav-10008" aria-expanded="false" class="accordion-button collapsed" data-bs-target="#collapseNav-10008" data-bs-toggle="collapse" type="but
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Åpent i dag</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

<h6 class="text-black fs-5 text-center font-primary"> 08:00 </h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Kommende opplevelser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

MODERATE

Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="accordion-header"> <button aria-controls="collapseNav-10008" aria-expanded="false" class="accordion-button collapsed" data-bs-target="#collapseNav-10008" data-bs-toggle="collapse" type="but
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Åpent i dag</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

MODERATE

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://floyen.no --max-pages 21 --format html
